visual_description:
A medium shot focuses on a man in a white shirt, dark tie, and an ID badge, standing in what appears to be an office or control room. He has a stern, angry expression as he looks slightly off-camera. To his left, an old-style CRT monitor displays a black-and-white security camera feed of a hallway. In the top left corner of the frame, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera remains static, holding the shot on the man's emotional reaction. A man speaks in a loud, aggressive, and furious tone, his voice filled with anger and accusation. He shouts, "尽忠职守，你找人调查他，内务部又是什么态度啊？" (Duty-bound, you find someone to investigate him, what was the Internal Affairs Department's attitude?). The audio is clear of any background music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the man's intense and confrontational speech.

The camera pulls back to a wide shot, revealing the full context of the room. The man from the first shot is now seen standing at the head of a long, dark-colored conference table.
